## 📋 Agenda (Draft)
- 6:30 – 6:40 PM: Welcome & introductions  
- 6:40 – 7:20 PM: Talk 1  
- 7:20 – 7:30 PM: Short break + networking  
- 7:30 – 8:10 PM: Talk 2  
- 8:10 – 8:50 PM: Open Q&A / Panel / Discussion  
- 8:50 – 9:00 PM: Closing remarks  

Feel free to suggest changes to the agenda in the comments.

## 📢 How to Join
- **RSVP on Luma** (recommended for reminders and updates) → [Luma Event Link](https://lu.ma/[ADD-LUMA-LINK-HERE])  
- Drop-ins welcome depending on venue capacity

## 💬 Discussion & Help Needed
Use this issue for:
- Venue suggestions
- Questions about the event
- Talk topic requests
- Volunteering (AV, photos, setup, etc.)
- Any other feedback

## After the Event
- Speaker slides and recording will be added to this issue
- The issue will be closed once all materials are uploaded
